results.aiTitle: Lost ID card used after report, security risk
results.aiResolutionText: This is a security incident requiring immediate action. Please report the access attempt to the Campus Security Control Room at SEC-001, Main Gate Security Block (open 24x7, phone +91-90000-10021) for urgent blocking and log review. Then, follow up with the Discipline and Safety Office at SA-012, Student Affairs Block (Monday-Friday, 9:30 AM-5:00 PM, email discipline@college.edu) for further investigation and ID replacement.

results.title: Street lights near hostel path are not working
results.aiTitle: Street lights out near hostel path
results.aiResolutionText: Your safety concern about non-functional street lights near the hostel path has been routed to the Campus Security Control Room (Room SEC-001, Ground Floor, Main Gate Security Block, open 24x7, contact: +91-90000-10021). For immediate danger, report directly to security. The Discipline and Safety Office (Room SA-012, Ground Floor, Student Affairs Block, open Monday-Friday, 9:30 AM-5:00 PM) will oversee follow-up.

results.title: Possible outsider entry near campus block
results.aiTitle: Unfamiliar person near academic block without escort
results.aiResolutionText: Your security concern about an unfamiliar person near the academic block has been routed to the Campus Security Control Room for immediate review. Please report any active or urgent incidents directly to the security control desk at Main Gate Security Block, Room SEC-001 (open 24x7, contact +91-90000-10021) and update this grievance with any new details.

results.title: Parking area has a CCTV blind spot
results.aiTitle: CCTV blind spot in hostel parking area
results.aiResolutionText: Your safety concern about a CCTV blind spot in the hostel parking area has been routed to the Campus Security Control Room (Room SEC-001, Ground Floor, Main Gate Security Block, open 24x7, contact +91-90000-10021) for immediate review. For urgent safety risks, report directly to security first.

results.title: Revaluation result is still not published
results.aiTitle: Revaluation result not published after application
results.aiResolutionText: Your revaluation result is pending publication. Please contact the Revaluation Desk in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-022, Monday-Friday, 10:30 AM-4:30 PM, or email examcell@college.edu with your exam, subject code, and original result publication date for assistance.

results.title: Evaluated answer script copy request is pending
results.aiTitle: Evaluated answer script copy request pending
results.aiResolutionText: Your evaluated answer script copy request is pending. Please contact the Revaluation Desk in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-022, Monday-Friday, 10:30 AM-4:30 PM, or email examcell@college.edu with your roll number, subject code, and original result publication date for assistance.

results.title: Revaluation fee payment is not reflected
results.aiTitle: Revaluation fee payment not reflected in portal
results.aiResolutionText: Your revaluation fee payment issue is a routine administrative correction. Please visit the Revaluation Desk in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-022, Monday-Friday, 10:30 AM-4:30 PM, or email examcell@college.edu with your roll number, subject code, and semester details. The desk will verify your payment and update the exam ledger to reflect it in the portal.

results.title: Consolidated marksheet not updated after revaluation change
results.aiTitle: Consolidated marksheet not updated after revaluation
results.aiResolutionText: Your consolidated marksheet update after revaluation requires verification by the Examination Cell. Please contact the Exam coordination desk in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-020, Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM, or email examcell@college.edu with your roll number, subject code, and semester details for manual review and correction.

results.title: Photocopy request status is stuck in processing
results.aiTitle: Answer script photocopy request stuck in processing
results.aiResolutionText: Your answer script photocopy request is delayed. Please contact the Revaluation Desk in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-022, Monday-Friday, 10:30 AM-4:30 PM, or email examcell@college.edu with your roll number, subject code, and semester details for assistance.

results.title: Two elective exams are scheduled at the same time
results.aiTitle: Elective exam schedule overlap
results.aiResolutionText: Your exam schedule overlap has been forwarded to the Exam Scheduling Desk for urgent review. Please visit Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-024 (Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM) or email examcell@college.edu with your roll number, subject codes, and a copy of your timetable to expedite resolution.

results.title: Practical exam clashes with project review schedule
results.aiTitle: Practical exam clashes with mandatory project review
results.aiResolutionText: Your schedule conflict between a practical exam and mandatory project review has been forwarded to the Exam Scheduling Desk for urgent review. Please visit Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-024 (Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM) or email examcell@college.edu with your roll number, subject codes, semester details, and timetable copy.

results.title: Revised exam timetable is not updated in portal
results.aiTitle: Revised exam timetable not updated in portal
results.aiResolutionText: The revised exam timetable update is pending in the portal. Please contact the Exam Scheduling Desk in Room A-024, Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM, or email examcell@college.edu with your roll number and subject details for assistance.

results.title: Exam venue change was communicated too late
results.aiTitle: Late communication of exam venue change
results.aiResolutionText: The Examination Cell has been notified of the late communication regarding the exam venue change. Please contact the Exam coordination desk in Room A-020, Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM, or email examcell@college.edu with your roll number, subject code, and semester details for clarification and to ensure timely updates in the future.

results.title: Supplementary exam date is unclear
results.aiTitle: Unclear supplementary exam date notice
results.aiResolutionText: Please contact the Exam coordination desk in Room A-020, Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM, or email examcell@college.edu for clarification on the supplementary exam date. Have your roll number, subject code, and semester details ready.

results.title: Hall ticket is blocked even though dues were cleared
results.aiTitle: Hall ticket blocked despite cleared dues
results.aiResolutionText: Your hall ticket is blocked due to a dues flag mismatch. Visit the Hall Ticket Help Desk (Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-026) Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM with your roll number, semester details, and proof of payment. The Examination Cell will verify your clearance status and refresh the system flag.

results.title: Hall ticket has a spelling mistake in my name
results.aiTitle: Hall ticket name spelling error
results.aiResolutionText: Visit the Hall Ticket Help Desk (Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-026) Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM with your roll number and a screenshot of the spelling error. The desk handles hall-ticket corrections and will regenerate your ticket from updated records.

results.title: Elective subject is missing on hall ticket
results.aiTitle: Elective missing on hall ticket
results.aiResolutionText: Your elective subject missing from the hall ticket has been routed to the Hall Ticket Help Desk. Please visit the Hall-ticket correction desk in Room A-026, Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM, with your roll number, subject code, semester details, and a screenshot of the registration portal showing the elective. Contact examcell@college.edu for further assistance.

results.title: Hall ticket is missing my profile photo
results.aiTitle: Hall ticket missing profile photo before exam
results.aiResolutionText: Your hall ticket photo issue has been routed to the Hall Ticket Help Desk in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-026 (open Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM). Please visit with your roll number, semester details, and a screenshot of the issue. The desk will rerun the profile image sync to regenerate your hall ticket with the correct photo.

results.title: Need confidential handling for repeated inappropriate comments
results.aiTitle: Confidential PoSH complaint for repeated inappropriate comments
results.aiResolutionText: Your confidential PoSH complaint has been routed to the Internal Complaints Committee (ICC) confidential intake desk. For next steps, visit the Student Support Center, Second Floor, Room SSC-207, Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-4:00 PM, or contact icc@college.edu. Use confidential channels and avoid sharing details publicly.

Avoid sharing details publicly and use these channels for safety.

Share only minimum required facts and request confidential follow-up.
